allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, ''src''\); from meeting_notes import __version__; print\(__version__\)")
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 PYTHONUTF8=1 python -X utf8 -m meeting_notes.cli process "2026-02-11 14-16-03.mp4" -o ./meeting-notes)
Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 python -X utf8 -m pytest tests/ -m "not integration" -v 2>&1)
Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 python -X utf8 -m pytest api/tests/ -m "not integration" -v)
Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 python -X utf8 -m pytest api/tests/test_api.py -v -m "not integration")
Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 python -X utf8 -m pytest api/tests/test_api.py -m "not integration" -v)

Bash(bash -c 'if ! command -v python &>/dev/null; then echo "python not on PATH"; _winpy=$\(where.exe python 2>/dev/null | head -1 | tr -d "\\r"\); echo "where.exe found: $_winpy"; _pydir=$\(cd "$\(dirname "$_winpy"\)" && pwd\); echo "pydir: $_pydir"; export PATH="$_pydir:$_pydir/Scripts:$PATH"; echo "PATH now includes python?"; command -v python; python --version; pip --version; meeting-notes --help 2>&1 | head -1; else echo "python already on PATH"; fi')
Bash(bash -l -c 'command -v python && echo found || echo ""not found""')
Bash(bash -c 'command -v python && echo found || echo ""not found""')
